title: Neanotis mairei
taxonomy: Neanotis mairei is classified within the family Gentianaceae. This classification places it within the order Gentianales, alongside other related plant species. Neanotis mairei is further classified as a member of the genus Neanotis, which is a group of flowering plants native to certain regions. The taxonomy of Neanotis mairei is subject to ongoing research and refinement. As such, its classification may be subject to revision as new information becomes available.
uses: Neanotis mairei is reportedly used in traditional medicine. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
